name: Henan Yuneng Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Henan Yuneng Holdings Co.,Ltd., through its subsidiaries, invests in, develops, generates, and sells electricity in China. The company generates electricity through coal. It also develops and promotes high technology; sells power materials and fly ash; and provides power environmental protection and energy-saving technological transformation services. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
